Project Wizard Flow

Step-by-step onboarding with backend integration mapping

12 Steps
1

Sign Up

UI Layer

Email/Google/GitHub auth forms

Backend

POST /api/v1/auth/register

Database

INSERT users

Worker

None

2

Create Project

UI Layer

Project name, niche selection

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects

Database

INSERT projects (status: draft)

Worker

None

3

Connect Shopify

UI Layer

Store URL input, API token

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects/:id/shopify

Database

UPDATE projects (shopify credentials)

Worker

Test connection job

4

Connect AutoDS

UI Layer

API key input

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects/:id/autods

Database

UPDATE projects (autods credentials)

Worker

Validate AutoDS key

5

Connect AI Provider

UI Layer

Provider select, API key

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects/:id/ai

Database

UPDATE projects (ai config)

Worker

Test AI generation

6

Connect Research APIs

UI Layer

Serper, Tavily keys

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects/:id/research

Database

UPDATE projects (research keys)

Worker

None

7

Review Configuration

UI Layer

Summary page, validation status

Backend

GET /api/v1/projects/:id/validate

Database

SELECT all credentials

Worker

None

8

Launch AI Workspace

UI Layer

Launch button, confirmation

Backend

POST /api/v1/projects/:id/launch

Database

UPDATE projects (status: provisioning)

Worker

None (triggers Orchestrator)

9

Provision VPS

UI Layer

Progress bar, logs stream

Backend

Orchestrator creates VPS

Database

INSERT workers (status: creating)

Worker

None

10

Research Phase

UI Layer

Live logs, progress indicators

Backend

Job queued in Redis

Database

INSERT jobs (type: research)

Worker

Execute market research

11

Building Store

UI Layer

Real-time build progress

Backend

Multiple jobs queued

Database

UPDATE jobs (status: running)

Worker

Execute store build pipeline

12

Completed

UI Layer

Store preview, next steps

Backend

Project marked active

Database

UPDATE projects (status: active)

Worker

Continuous automation

Backend Integration Points

API Layer

  • • Input validation (Zod)
  • • JWT authentication
  • • Credential encryption
  • • Rate limiting
  • • Audit logging

Database Layer

  • • Prisma ORM
  • • Row Level Security
  • • Encrypted columns
  • • Audit timestamps
  • • Realtime subscriptions

Queue Layer

  • • BullMQ jobs
  • • Job state persistence
  • • Retry with backoff
  • • Priority queues
  • • Dead letter handling
